# FRS-BS-02: Add Checklist Item

**Module:** Bank Settings
**Version:** 1.0
**Author:** generated by frs-generator skill
**Date:** 2026-04-29
**Related FRS:** FRS-BS-01, FRS-BS-03, FRS-BS-04, FRS-BS-05, FRS-BS-06

---

## 1. Purpose

This specification describes how a Bank Administrator adds a new item to the LC Issuance Checklist. New items are automatically assigned the next available sequence number and set to active status. The operation enables administrators to extend the verification checklist used by Branch and CTF staff during LC review.

---

## 2. Scope

**In scope:** Opening the Add Item dialog; entering and submitting a description; system assignment of sequence number and active status; confirmation feedback to the administrator; new item visible in the checklist table.

**Out of scope:** Editing or deleting items (FRS-BS-03, FRS-BS-06); toggling status (FRS-BS-04); reordering (FRS-BS-05); bulk import of items.

---

## 3. Actors

| Actor | Role | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| Bank Administrator | Initiates the add operation | Requires ChecklistItems.Create permission |

---

## 4. Preconditions

- Bank Administrator is authenticated and has the ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- The Bank Settings checklist page is open (FRS-BS-01 satisfied).

---

## 5. Dependencies

**Inter-FRS Dependencies:**
- **FRS-BS-01: View LC Issuance Checklist Items** - the checklist page must be loaded for the Add Item button to be accessible.

**System & Technical Dependencies:**
- **Authentication & Authorization** - user must hold ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- **Sequence Numbering** - the system assigns the next available sequence number automatically; no manual input is required.

---

## 6. Trigger

The Bank Administrator clicks the Add Item button on the checklist management page.

---

## 7. Main Flow

1. **Bank Administrator** clicks the Add Item button.
2. **System** opens the Add Checklist Item dialog with an empty description field.
3. **Bank Administrator** types the item description into the Description field.
4. **Bank Administrator** clicks the Add Item confirmation button.
5. **System** validates the description (non-empty, within 500 characters).
6. **System** creates the checklist item, assigns the next sequence number, and sets status to Active.
7. **System** closes the dialog and displays a success notification: "Checklist item added".
8. **System** updates the checklist table; the new item appears at the bottom of the list.
9. Operation ends successfully.

---

## 8. Alternative Flows

### 8a. Administrator Cancels the Dialog

*Branches from step 3 of the main flow.*

1. **Bank Administrator** clicks the Cancel button.
2. **System** closes the dialog without creating any item.
3. The checklist table remains unchanged.
4. Operation ends without any modification.

---

## 9. Exception Flows

### 9a. Empty Description Submitted

- **Trigger:** The description field is empty or contains only whitespace.
- **Outcome:** The Add Item confirmation button remains disabled; submission is blocked.
- **Resolution:** Administrator enters a non-empty description to enable the button.

### 9b. Description Exceeds Maximum Length

- **Trigger:** The description exceeds 500 characters.
- **Outcome:** The system rejects the submission and informs the administrator of the length constraint.
- **Resolution:** Administrator shortens the description to within 500 characters.

### 9c. Insufficient Permission

- **Trigger:** User does not hold ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- **Outcome:** The Add Item button is not available or the action is rejected.
- **Resolution:** Administrator with sufficient permission must grant the role.

---

## 10. Postconditions

**On success:** A new checklist item exists with the entered description, an auto-assigned sequence number, and Active status. The item is immediately visible in the checklist table.
**On failure:** No new item is created; the checklist remains unchanged.

---

## 11. Form Fields

| Field Name | Mandatory | Input Method | Description | Validation / Remarks |
|------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|----------------------|
| Description | Yes | Free text (multi-line) | The verification instruction displayed during LC review | 1-500 characters; whitespace-only not accepted |

---

## 12. Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Priority |
|----|-------------|----------|
| FR-BS-02-01 | The system SHALL open an Add Checklist Item dialog when the Add Item button is clicked. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-02 | The system SHALL disable the Add Item confirmation button when the description field is empty or whitespace-only. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-03 | The system SHALL reject descriptions that exceed 500 characters. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-04 | The system SHALL automatically assign the next available sequence number to the new item. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-05 | The system SHALL set new checklist items to Active status by default. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-06 | The system SHALL display a success notification upon successful item creation. | Must |
| FR-BS-02-07 | The system SHALL update the checklist table immediately after a successful add without requiring a page reload. | Must |

---

#### Scenario 1: Add Checklist Item with Valid Description (Success)

**Feature:** bank-settings-checklist | **Type:** Functional | **Priority:** High | **Tags:** @smoke @bank-settings-checklist

**Preconditions:**
- Bank Administrator is logged in with ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- The checklist management page is open.

**Steps:**

1. Navigate to /bank-settings -> selector: n/a
2. Click the Add Item button -> selector: #btn-add-item
3. Verify the Add Checklist Item dialog is open -> selector: #dialog-add-item
4. Fill in the Description field -> selector: #input-add-description
5. Click the Add Item confirmation button -> selector: #btn-add-confirm
6. Verify the checklist table body is updated -> selector: #checklist-table-body

**Expected Result:**
- Dialog closes after submission.
- Success notification "Checklist item added" appears.
- New item appears in the checklist table as the last row.

**Test Data:**
- Description: `BS02 Verify applicant KYC documents are complete {timestamp}`

---

**Feature:** bank-settings-checklist | **Type:** Functional | **Priority:** Medium | **Tags:** @regression @bank-settings-checklist

**Preconditions:**
- Bank Administrator is logged in with ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- The checklist management page is open.

**Steps:**

1. Navigate to /bank-settings -> selector: n/a
2. Click the Add Item button -> selector: #btn-add-item
3. Verify the Add Checklist Item dialog is open -> selector: #dialog-add-item
4. Fill in the Description field with a 500-character description -> selector: #input-add-description
5. Verify the Add Item confirmation button is enabled -> selector: #btn-add-confirm
6. Click the Add Item confirmation button -> selector: #btn-add-confirm
7. Verify the checklist table body is updated -> selector: #checklist-table-body

**Expected Result:**
- System accepts the 500-character description.
- Item is created and appears in the list.

**Test Data:**
- Description: `BS02MaxLen Verify that all mandatory documents submitted by the applicant are complete, legible, and free of alterations, including the application form, commercial invoice, packing list, insurance certificate, and any special documents as required by the LC terms and conditions for this specific transaction.`

- Bank Administrator is logged in with ChecklistItems.Create permission.
- The Add Checklist Item dialog is open.

3. Verify the Add Checklist Item dialog is open -> selector: #dialog-add-item
4. Leave the Description field empty -> selector: n/a
5. Verify the Add Item confirmation button is disabled -> selector: #btn-add-confirm

**Expected Result:**
- Add Item confirmation button is disabled.
- No item is created.
- Dialog remains open.

**Test Data:**

---

## 14. Non-Functional Requirements

| Category | Requirement |
|----------|-------------|
| Performance | Dialog opens immediately on button click; item appears in the list without page reload. |
| Availability | Available during standard business hours; consistent with overall platform availability. |

---

## 15. Business Rules

- BR-01: A checklist item description must be between 1 and 500 characters; whitespace-only descriptions are not accepted.
- BR-02: New items are always created with Active status and assigned the next available sequence number automatically; the administrator does not set these values during creation.

---

## 16. Edge Cases

- EC-01: When the description field contains exactly 500 characters, the system accepts it; at 501 characters the system rejects the submission with a length constraint message.
- EC-02: When multiple administrators add items simultaneously, each item receives a unique sequence number; no two items share the same sequence number within a tenant.

---

| 2 | Should the Description textarea have a visible character counter to indicate the 500-character limit? | Product | - |
